mechanism_narrative: A low but stable FEDFUNDS rate keeps discount-rate pressure contained, so improving risk appetite dominates and the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days when inflation is not accelerating.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day yield moves are negative in most instances when FEDFUNDS is flat-to-lower and CPIAUCSL inflation is not accelerating, or if the sign agreement rate stays below 55% in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in CPIAUCSL above its recent trend forces the market to price tighter policy and higher term premia, so the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days after the inflation breakout.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if inflation breakouts are followed by flat or falling 10-year yields more than 60% of the time, or if the average 20-day yield response is not positive after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in PAYEMS combined with a decline in UNRATE signals broad labor-market strength, which lifts growth expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint payroll gains and unemployment declines do not produce positive 20-day yield moves, or if either proxy alone explains the signal equally well and interaction terms add no incremental predictive value.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is falling while HOUST is also weakening, the market reads this as soft real activity and lower inflation pressure, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive INDPRO declines are not followed by lower 10-year yields, or if the joint INDPRO-HOUST pattern has no stronger effect than random monthly noise.

mechanism_narrative: A broad demand slowdown shown by falling GDPC1 and weaker RSAFS reduces nominal growth expectations, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if demand slowdowns are not associated with lower yields over the next month, or if the sign relationship flips frequently across rolling quarters.

mechanism_narrative: If UNRATE rises sharply above its recent level, investors price weaker consumption and slower earnings growth, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days after the labor deterioration signal appears.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage points in 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE jumps are followed by rising yields more often than falling yields, or if the average 5-day post-trigger yield change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening cycle, a high FEDFUNDS rate matters more when CPIAUCSL is still elevated: the market expects further policy restraint and higher real yields, so the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if high FEDFUNDS during elevated CPIAUCSL does not coincide with positive 20-day yield direction, or if the effect disappears once inflation is controlled for.

mechanism_narrative: During a consumer-demand slowdown, weak RSAFS combined with soft GDP growth lowers nominal revenue expectations and compresses term premia, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if weak sales plus weak GDP do not produce negative 60-day yield direction, or if the relationship fails in consecutive rolling 3-year windows.
